name: twist-jason-hype-speech
description: TWiST pack — hype-soup transcript with AI buzzwords, name-drops, and confident predictions. Jason (troll slot) should dominate pick.

input.transcript: Trust me, this is the most disruptive, game-changing AI-native agent company of the decade. Obviously Elon is texting about it, obviously Sam Altman already sees it, and frankly this is a 100x moonshot for the AI vertical. At our firm we were early on this thesis. Everyone knows a16z and Andreessen are about to lead the Series B — it's a paradigm-shift, and honestly the only way forward. Look, the reality is that Sequoia is going to regret passing on this one.
